final:
module T_latch (  
    input wire T,  
    input wire CLK,  
    input wire RST,  
    output reg Q  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (RST) begin  
            Q <= 0;  
        end else if (T) begin  
            Q <= ~Q;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
